subcodes.first_line: The effulgent splendor emanating from the horizon of grandeur and the sweet, fragrant praise pervading all regions be upon you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: البهاء المتلئلا من افق الکبریاء و الثناء الطیب الذکی المعطر لکل الارجاء علیکم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for martyrs, @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @high station of the true believer
